title: Beautified Sky
description: Makes the sky looks pretty pretty leveraging compatible core shaders!
body:
English

❔ About

Beautified Sky is a resource pack that aims to make pretty much everything in the sky look as gorgeous as it can get. At its core it is based on Gradient Clouds (by Lezzlebit), with the goal of making it available to more versions, and improving upon its work. It's also entirely customisable, although this come at the cost of having a required dependency to Respackopts (by JFronny).

📦 Features

☁️ Clouds

  • Gradient clouds (requires to set Clouds on Fancy in Minecraft's Video Settings)
  • Improved whiteout
  • Clouds curvature
  • Adjustable clouds height

✨ Stars

  • Tintable stars
  • Twinkle, Twinkle, Little Star
  • Adjustable brightness
Enjoy 🙂
